name: testMoveMerchantAcquirerDownAndUpButtons
description: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority
descriptionHtml: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0713.094745.23.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Gateway' tab
Select '0713.094745 company 112172' company using filter
Select 'MerchantAcquirer' business unit using filter
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0713.094745 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Close alert message
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0713.094745 acquirer for gateway Movable' acquirer using filter
Close alert message
Check that the first created acquirer priority is 0
Click on MoveMerchantAcquirerDownButton to move them down with less priority
Check that the second created acquirer priority is 0 now
Click on MoveMerchantAcquirerUpButton to move them up with more  priority
Check that the first created acquirer priority is 0 again
